title: sutera crassicaulis
intro: Sutera crassicaulis, also known as Chinese Chrysanthemum or Sutera, is a plant species that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Sutera crassicaulis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs and sore throats, and promote digestion. Sutera crassicaulis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, capsules, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
